text: Due to a lack of recent comparable sales an extensive search was made to find recent comparable sales in competing neighborhoods in Bloomington-Normal, IL. The comparables were selected to demonstrate the marketability of recently updated/renovated ranch-style houses of a similar location, age, GLA, and condition. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 3.9% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its quality, bathroom count, GLA, basement, garage space count, and fence. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, age, condition, GLA, basement, and fireplace. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, condition, GLA, basement, and fireplace. See Comparables #4 & #5.
